violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Food bins in the cold prep area are not date marked. -Sauce bottles and open sauce jugs are not date marked in the bottom of the cold prep table.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -The facility is using cardboard to line shelves in the kitchen.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -The air fryer ovens have a build up of soot/burnt food under the cooking racks.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Sticky/Greasy residue build up on counters and shelves in kitchen

Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. -Forks are stored with the handle down and prongs upward. Advise storing with the handles up to prevent contamination when grabbing utensils.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Both the men's and women's restroom vents are in need of cleaning. Both restrooms are missing ceiling tiles or some that are stained and need to be replaced.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -The walls behind and the ceiling above the air fryers have a brown build-up and need to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop heads are not being hung up or allowed to air-dry in the storage closet located in the women's bathroom.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Cleaning supplies such as spray air fresheners, hand soaps, and cleaning chemicals were found upstairs in the dry-storage area on three different levels of shelves. These products were directly next-to, or over, canned products. The owner fixed this on site designating a lower area away from the food product to store cleaning supplies.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing.-Discovered forks in the upright position- Found a set of tongs on the prep line that were from the previous day.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Working trays in the prep table were not date marked.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -The lack of a vent hood over the pizza oven is creating a grease buildup throughout.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Entirety of kitchen has a build up of grease and is stained and discolored.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Forks and utensils stored in the upright position.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walls ceilings and floors are stained, discolored and have a build up of grease.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
